text:
Me: *Walking in a mall* *Sees top hat* Oh, Hi! Have we met? I think I met you in high school before! Y'know, when you were a cap?
|
Top hat: .....
|
Me: OH, MY GOD! HOW DID YOU KNOW I WAS HERE FOR A NEW SHIRT?!
|
Top hat: ......
|
Me: Oh, the stain? That's nothi-
|
*Notices frilly dress in the distance
|
Me: Um, its just from this morning when I was having brea-
|
Frilly dress:.... 
|
Me: ...could you excuse me for a moment please? Faces frilly dress in distance WHAT?!
|
Frilly dress:....
|
Me: NO- No we're- We're just talking!! We were just talking! WHAT, I'M NOT ALLOWED TO TALK TO ANYONE NOW!? YOU'RE SO FUCKING CONTROLLING!!!!! I HATE YOU!!! *looks back at top hat* Sorry about that, where were we?
